invariants.name: generate_main_requires_module_name
invariants.assert: generate_main returns error if module_name is empty

invariants.name: generate_commands_handles_empty
invariants.assert: generate_commands produces valid output for empty command list

invariants.name: generate_validation_checks_tdd
invariants.assert: Validation includes TDD contract checks when tests present

invariants.name: generate_main_output_valid_zig
invariants.assert: Generated main function is syntactically valid Zig

invariants.name: generate_commands_dispatch_complete
invariants.assert: All provided commands appear in generated dispatch table

invariants.name: runtime_init_sets_stack_and_heap
invariants.assert: Runtime init configures both stack and heap sizes
